Part.Source:
&erro = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MdfeCod &HojeData = serverdate()
&NewMdfeCod = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.MDFE, &EmpCod, &auxFilCod) &MdfeNum = UltimoCodigoEmpresa.Udp(domParCod.MDFENUM, &EmpCod, &auxFilCod) &MdfeSer = RetornaSerieNF.Udp(domParCod.MDFESER, &EmpCod, &auxFilCod)
If &erro = 0 New
EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeNum = &MdfeNum MDFeSer = &MdfeSer MDFeDtaEms = serverdate() MDFeHorEms = sErverTime() MDFeDtaSai = serverdate() MDFeHorSai = ServerTime() MDFeOriUfeCod = MDFeOriUfeCod MDFeTipEmt = MDFeTipEmt MDFeTipTra = MDFeTipTra MDFeDstUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod MDFeModCod = '58' MDFeTipMod = MDFeTipMod MDFeChv = '' MDFeTipCar = MDFeTipCar MDFeProPre = MDFeProPre MDFeProPreNcm = MDFeProPreNcm MDFeProt = '' MDFeAdc = MDFeAdc MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Digitando MDFeArqXml = '' MDFeLotCarCep = MDFeLotCarCep MDFeLotDesCep = MDFeLotDesCep MDfeUnd = MDfeUnd MDFePsoBrt = MDFePsoBrt MDFeVlrTot = MDFeVlrTot MDFeRNTRC = MDFeRNTRC MdfeConCnpj = MdfeConCnpj MdfeConRaz = MdfeConRaz MDFeDesCidCod = MDFeDesCidCod MdfePosVale= MdfePosVale MDFeTomFrt = MDFeTomFrt MdfeIndCanalVerde = MdfeIndCanalVerde MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = MdfeIndCarregaPosterior MDFePgtFrt = MDFePgtFrt MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj = MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj MdfeInfPagFrtRaz = MdfeInfPagFrtRaz MdfePgtFrtTot = MdfePgtFrtTot MdfePgtFrtForPgt = MdfePgtFrtForPgt MdfePgtFrtBanCod = MdfePgtFrtBanCod MdfePgtFrtBanAge = MdfePgtFrtBanAge MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj = MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj
EndNew
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeCiotCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfeCiotCod = MdfeCiotCod MDFeCIOT = MDFeCIOT MDFeCIOTCnpj =MDFeCIOTCnpj EndNew
Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePgtParNro New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfePgtParNro = MdfePgtParNro MdfePgtParVct = MdfePgtParVct MdfePgtParVlr = MdfePgtParVlr EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePgtFrtCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfePgtFrtCod = MdfePgtFrtCod MdfePgtFrtTip = MdfePgtFrtTip MdfePgtFrtDes = MdfePgtFrtDes MdfePgtFrtVlr = MdfePgtFrtVlr EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfeSegCod = MdfeSegCod // MdfeSegCod = &MdfeSegCod MdfeSegRef = MdfeSegRef MdfeSegRes = MdfeSegRes MdfeSegResCnpj =MdfeSegResCnpj MdfeSegNom = MdfeSegNom MdfeSegCnpj = MdfeSegCnpj MdfeSegNroApo = MdfeSegNroApo EndNew For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod,MdfeSegNroAve New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfeSegCod = MdfeSegCod MdfeSegNroAve = MdfeSegNroAve MdfeSegQCTXml = MdfeSegQCTXml EndNew Endfor Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeVeiCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeVeiCod = MDFeVeiCod MDFeVeiPla = MDFeVeiPla MDFeVeiUF = MDFeVeiUF MDFeVeiTar = MDFeVeiTar MDFeVeiCap = MDFeVeiCap MDFeVeiCapM3 = MDFeVeiCapM3 MDFeVeiTipCar = MDFeVeiTipCar MDFeVeiTipRod = MDFeVeiTipRod MDFeVeiRen = MDFeVeiRen MDFeVeiRNTRC = MDFeVeiRNTRC MDFeVeiProCnpj = MDFeVeiProCnpj MDFeVeiProIe = MDFeVeiProIe MDFeVeiProRaz = MDFeVeiProRaz MdfeVeiProTip = MdfeVeiProTip MDFeVeiProUf = MDFeVeiProUf EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeRebCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeRebCod = MDFeRebCod MDFeRebPla = MDFeRebPla MDFeRebUF = MDFeRebUF MDFeRebTar = MDFeRebTar MDFeRebCap = MDFeRebCap MDFeRebCapM3 = MDFeRebCapM3 MDFeRebTipCar = MDFeRebTipCar MDFERebTipRod = MDFERebTipRod MDfeRebRen = MDfeRebRen MDFeRebRNTRC = MDFeRebRNTRC MDFeRebProCnpj = MDFeRebProCnpj MDFeRebProIe = MDFeRebProIe MDFeRebProRaz = MDFeRebProRaz MdfeRebProTip = MdfeRebProTip MDFeRebProUf = MDFeRebProUf EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeCarCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeCarCod = MDFeCarCod MDFeCarCidCod = MDFeCarCidCod EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFePerCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFePerCod = MDFePerCod MDFePerUfeCod = MDFePerUfeCod EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeMotCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeMotCod = MDFeMotCod MDFeMotCpf = MDFeMotCpf MDFeMotNom = MDFeMotNom EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeNFeItm New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeNFeItm = MDFeNFeItm MDFeNFeFilCod = MDFeNFeFilCod MDFeNfeCod = MDFeNfeCod MDFeNfeChv = MDFeNfeChv MDFeNfeChv2 = MDFeNfeChv2 MDfeNfeCidCod = MDfeNfeCidCod MDFeNfeCidNom = MDFeNfeCidNom MdfeNfeUfeCod = MdfeNfeUfeCod MDFeNfeVlrTot = MDFeNfeVlrTot MDfeNfePso = MDfeNfePso EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeCteItm New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MDFeCteItm = MDFeCteItm MDFeCteFilCod = MDFeCteFilCod MDFeCteCod = MDFeCteCod MDFeCteChv = MDFeCteChv MDFeCteChv2 = MDFeCteChv2 MDfeCteCidCod = MDfeCteCidCod MDFeCteCidNom = MDFeCteCidNom MdfeCteUfeCod = MdfeCteUfeCod MDFeCteVlrTot = MDFeCteVlrTot MDfeCtePso = MDfeCtePso EndNew Endfor
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePedCod New EmpCod = &EmpCod FilCod = &auxFilCod MDFeCod = &NewMdfeCod MdfePedCod = MdfePedCod MdfePedCnpjFor = MdfePedCnpjFor MdfePedResPag = MdfePedResPag MdfePedNroCom = MdfePedNroCom MdfePedVlr = MdfePedVlr EndNew Endfor
EndIf EndFor
// LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) // &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) // // // If &MDFeCod <> 0 // Do 'LoadMDFe' // Else // // &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // &PesCod = &Context.PesCod // &FilTime = &Context.FilTime // RetornaConfSistema.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon002_FilialFaturamento, &CfgVlr) // &FilCod = val(&CfgVlr) // If &FilCod.IsEmpty() // &FilCod = &Context.FilCod // EndIF // &MDFeDtaEms = serverdate() // &MDFeHorEms = iif(&FilTime <> 0,serverTime()-&FilTime,serverTime()) // &MDFeDtaSai = serverdate() // &MDFeHorSai = serverTime() // &MDFeSer = 1 // &MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Digitando // &MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador // &MDFeModCod = '58' // &MDFeTipMod = TipoModalidade.Rodoviario // &MdfeNum = 0 // PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) // // If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() // &MDFeTipEmt = iif(Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = '1',MDFe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador,MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador) // EndIF // // For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod // Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod // Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod // &MDFeOriUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod // &MDFeCarCidCod = FilCidCod // &MdfeRNTRC = FilRNTRC // Exit // EndFor // EndIf // EndIf
